case_title: BERNHARDT, JULIE et al vs. HAGAN, DEBORAH ANN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNHARDT, JULIE BERNHARDT, ROBERT BERNHARDT, ELEANOR HAMILTON, MARK PAUL, LAURI SIRKIN, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAGAN, DEBORAH ANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 505 BARTLETT ST $5,518.51 RENT, $200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $207.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,925.51, LEASE FORFEITED
